title: Loom Runtime Policy
description: Security policy configuration for Loom runtime.

allow_all.description: If true, allow all capabilities unless denied by deny_globs.

trust_mode.description: trusted enforces policy; restricted also disables write/move/import/watch/network operations.

read_paths.description: Allowed paths for read operations. Entries may be literal roots or glob patterns.

write_paths.description: Allowed paths for write operations. Entries may be literal roots or glob patterns.

import_paths.description: Allowed paths for @import module loading. Entries may be literal roots or glob patterns.

watch_paths.description: Allowed paths for @watch roots. Entries may be literal roots or glob patterns.

network_hosts.description: Allowed outbound HTTP hosts (host or host:port). Use '*' to allow all hosts.

deny_globs.description: Glob patterns that deny access even when allowlisted.
